pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot.

src/main/java/maven/Brute.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for file path creation.
Replace deprecated Runtime.exec(String) with Runtime.exec(String[]) to avoid ambiguity and deprecation warnings.

src/main/java/maven/DB.java.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.

src/main/java/maven/DB.java.after: "select CONTRACT_DEFINATION_UID from contract_defination where APPLICATION_NUMBER_ALIAS = '%s' order by issue_date desc".formatted(oaNo)

src/main/java/maven/DB.java.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.

src/main/java/maven/Downloader.java.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.

src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated URL constructor with URI.create().toURL() to comply with stricter security checks in newer JDKs.
src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.why_exists: The URL(String) constructor is deprecated and may throw SecurityException or fail validation in stricter security managers or future JDK versions; using URI is the recommended safe alternative.

src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.general_idea: Add import for java.net.URI to support the new URL creation method.
